CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2011 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Continued To Nov-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Michael Begert, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha , CSR: C. Yount #2737

Ryan Eddings, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Central parking System, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Louis Freaques, was placed under oath and direct examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Soliman Dogh, and Swift Parking, LLC. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $140,000.00
Attorney Fees - $23,368.50
Costs - $525.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $163,893.50

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
